scripts.build: sh -lc 'if [ -d "${HOMEBREW_PREFIX:-/opt/homebrew}/bin" ]; then export PATH="${HOMEBREW_PREFIX:-/opt/homebrew}/bin:$PATH"; fi; set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; set +a; turbo run build'
scripts.dev: sh -lc 'if [ -d "${HOMEBREW_PREFIX:-/opt/homebrew}/bin" ]; then export PATH="${HOMEBREW_PREFIX:-/opt/homebrew}/bin:$PATH"; fi; set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; set +a; turbo run dev --parallel'
scripts.dev:web: sh -lc 'if [ -d "${HOMEBREW_PREFIX:-/opt/homebrew}/bin" ]; then export PATH="${HOMEBREW_PREFIX:-/opt/homebrew}/bin:$PATH"; fi; export PORT=${PORT:-3001}; set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; set +a; npm run dev --workspace @portfolio/web'
scripts.typecheck: sh -lc 'if [ -d "${HOMEBREW_PREFIX:-/opt/homebrew}/bin" ]; then export PATH="${HOMEBREW_PREFIX:-/opt/homebrew}/bin:$PATH"; fi; set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; set +a; turbo run typecheck'
scripts.db:generate: sh -lc 'if [ -d "${HOMEBREW_PREFIX:-/opt/homebrew}/bin" ]; then export PATH="${HOMEBREW_PREFIX:-/opt/homebrew}/bin:$PATH"; fi; set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; set +a; npm run db:generate --workspace @portfolio/db'
scripts.db:migrate: sh -lc 'if [ -d "${HOMEBREW_PREFIX:-/opt/homebrew}/bin" ]; then export PATH="${HOMEBREW_PREFIX:-/opt/homebrew}/bin:$PATH"; fi; set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; set +a; npm run db:migrate --workspace @portfolio/db'
scripts.fidelity:import:preview: sh -lc 'if [ -d "${HOMEBREW_PREFIX:-/opt/homebrew}/bin" ]; then export PATH="${HOMEBREW_PREFIX:-/opt/homebrew}/bin:$PATH"; fi; set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; set +a; node scripts/run-fidelity-import.mjs --mode preview'
scripts.fidelity:import:commit: sh -lc 'if [ -d "${HOMEBREW_PREFIX:-/opt/homebrew}/bin" ]; then export PATH="${HOMEBREW_PREFIX:-/opt/homebrew}/bin:$PATH"; fi; set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; set +a; node scripts/run-fidelity-import.mjs --mode commit'
